Verse 49

The Kinsman-Redeemer. The word goel is used to indicate both the redemption-- "to free by paying," and the Redeemer--"the one who pays." The case of Ruth and Boaz Ruth 2:1; Ruth 3:10-18; Ruth 4:1-10 perfectly illustrates this beautiful type of Christ. See "Redemption, (See Scofield "Isaiah 59:20").
